description.overview: France's oldest sheepdog, the Berger Picard is known for their scruffy appearance and expressive ears. They're loyal, hardworking dogs with a great sense of humor.
description.history: The Berger Picard originated in France.
description.temperament: Known for being loyal, good-natured, observant.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their rough, tousled, medium-length coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: France's oldest sheepdog, the Berger Picard is known for their scruffy appearance and expressive ears. They're loyal, hardworking dogs with a great sense of humor.
